rules.summary: When a release keyword is used, commit changes in logical units using Conventional Commits.
rules.trigger_intent: committing changes as part of the automatic release pipeline requested by a release keyword
rules.evidence: 변경사항을 논리적 단위별로 나눠서 커밋 (conventional commit 형식)

rules.summary: Create the release PR from the current branch into main.
rules.trigger_intent: creating a pull request as part of the automatic release pipeline

rules.summary: Wait for CI to pass with gh pr checks --watch before continuing the release pipeline.
rules.trigger_intent: checking CI after creating the release pull request

rules.summary: Squash-merge the release PR only after CI passes.
Launch the Release workflow with the bump matching the requested patch, minor, or major release.
rules.trigger_intent: starting the Release workflow in response to a release keyword

rules.summary: Do not merge when CI fails.
rules.trigger_intent: merging a pull request whose CI has failed

rules.summary: After launching the Release workflow, check its status with gh run watch.
rules.trigger_intent: checking status after starting the Release workflow
rules.evidence: 릴리즈 워크플로우 실행 후 `gh run watch`로 상태 확인

rules.summary: If already on main with no changes, run only the release step.
rules.trigger_intent: executing a requested release while on main with a clean working tree
rules.evidence: 이미 main 브랜치에 있고 변경사항이 없으면 릴리즈만 실행

rules.summary: Before merging a PR, wait for CI Tests to pass or manually cancel them when unnecessary.
rules.trigger_intent: merging a pull request after it has been created
rules.evidence: CI Tests 통과 대기 (또는 불필요한 경우 수동 취소)

rules.summary: Never chain gh pr create and gh pr merge on one command line.
rules.trigger_intent: running a shell command that creates and merges a pull request in one chained line
rules.evidence: `gh pr create && gh pr merge`를 한 줄로 연결하지 말 것

rules.summary: Never merge immediately after creating a PR; check CI first.
rules.trigger_intent: merging a pull request immediately after creating it without first checking CI
rules.evidence: PR 생성 직후 바로 머지하지 말 것 — 항상 CI 상태를 확인한 후 머지

rules.trigger_intent: editing the Release workflow trigger configuration

rules.summary: Do not manually change local version files when using the Release workflow.
rules.trigger_intent: manually editing local version values as part of a workflow-driven release
rules.evidence: 로컬에서 수동 버전 변경 불필요 — 워크플로우가 전부 처리

rules.summary: When changing the version locally, edit package.json as the source of truth.
rules.trigger_intent: manually changing the project version in local files
rules.evidence: 로컬에서 수동 변경 시: `package.json` 수정 후

rules.summary: After manually editing package.json's version, run the version synchronization script.
rules.trigger_intent: running the required follow-up after manually changing the version in package.json

rules.summary: Prefer the Release workflow for automatic version management.
rules.trigger_intent: choosing how to perform version management for a release
rules.evidence: 권장: 릴리스 워크플로우를 통한 자동 버전 관리 사용
